headline: Aristocrat delivers the best value-for-money
detail: Sentiment score of 68.9 at an avg price of ₹3,613 — the best sentiment-per-rupee ratio across all brands.

headline: Aristocrat relies heavily on discounting
detail: Avg discount of 75% but only 4.0★ rating — heavy discounting may signal product perception issues rather than demand generation.

headline: Skybags has a rating–sentiment gap
detail: Star rating implies 4.2★ satisfaction but review sentiment score is only 59.5/100. Customers may rate generously but write critically.

headline: Safari dominates review volume
detail: 61,536 total ratings — 43% of all reviews in the dataset. High market penetration but check if sentiment holds.
